name: Sea Bass in Cilantro
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Sea Bass Or Red Snapper
1 cup Green Chiles, canned, drained and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the Sea Bass or Red Snapper fillets into 8 serving pieces.
2. Finely chop the green chiles after draining and canning them.
3. Use up to half a cup of the snipped cilantro, adjusting to taste.
